case_title: CACH, LLC VS. MONICA O RUIZ et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-30-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JAN-29-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUIZ, MONICA O AN INDIVIDUAL $7,168.06 PRINCIPAL, $1,050.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,548.40 INTEREST, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,051.46, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
